product_overview: A single-page conversational interface that runs an adaptive survey using an AI chat. Users answer questions in free text and receive immediate, context-aware follow-up prompts from the AI.
core_goals: Complete an adaptive survey by interacting with the AI in a chat format
Provide free-text answers to survey questions and follow-up prompts
Receive immediate AI-generated next questions and responses within the same chat session

features.name: AI Chat Interface
features.description: A conversational survey experience where the AI asks questions, the user types answers, and the AI responds with follow-ups or next questions in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See AI chat interface -> Read AI messages -> Type answer in input field -> Click send button or press enter to submit -> See loading state while waiting for AI response -> Read AI messages (AI response appears)

Navigate to / -> See AI chat interface -> Read AI messages -> Type answer in input field -> Press enter to submit -> See loading state while waiting for AI response -> Read AI messages (AI response appears)

Navigate to / -> See AI chat interface -> Read AI messages -> Type answer in input field -> Click send button or press enter to submit -> See loading state while waiting for AI response -> Read AI messages -> Type refined answer in input field -> Click send button or press enter to submit -> See loading state while waiting for AI response -> Read AI messages (AI updates follow-up)

features.name: AI Chat Interface
features.description: Conversational interface for the adaptive survey AI
user_interactions: Click send button or press enter to submit
See loading state while waiting for AI response
